task_description: Implement authentication and authorization system for Maestro with username/password login, group-based permissions (Administrators, Viewers, Approver, Operators, Developers), user management UI, and route protection.

verification.summary: 340 tests pass (288 pre-existing + 20 auth unit + 31 auth route/authorization + 1 review fix test). ruff check src/ passes clean. Alembic migration runs successfully. Code review findings addressed (cookie security, 401 for API, password validation, admin safeguard).
